title: [MTR4] Nobody's City Transport Pack
description: City Transport for MTR4 made by me :3
body:
# Created primarly for Nova MTR server, but free to use for everyone!
List of current retextures:
- Siemens s700 sound transit low floor
- ADL citea (with doors at right side)

Pack will contain both realistic and fictional liveries from Wroclaw City in Poland
